description: ML Model System - Model training pipeline, inference service, signal generation, and model lifecycle management for autonomous trading predictions on volatility indices

userStories.title: Set up ML model training pipeline foundation
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to set up a model training pipeline foundation to train machine learning models on historical data.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ModelTrainer class with sklearn-compatible API
Set up training data loading from Parquet files
Implement feature/target separation for supervised learning
Create unit tests for training pipeline
Add integration tests with sample data
userStories.notes: Foundation for all ML training work

userStories.title: Implement XGBoost binary classification model
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to train an XGBoost classifier to predict buy/sell signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement target variable creation (future price direction)
Train XGBoost classifier with default hyperparameters
Implement binary classification: buy (1) vs sell/wait (0)
Add class balancing for imbalanced data
Implement early stopping to prevent overfitting
Log training metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC)
Create training report with metrics and visualizations
Test model on hold-out test set

userStories.title: Implement XGBoost multi-class classification model
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to train a multi-class classifier to predict buy/sell/wait signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Define clear class labels (threshold-based or regime-based)
Train XGBoost classifier for multi-class prediction
Implement class weighting for imbalanced classes
Log training metrics for all 3 classes
Test model on hold-out test set
userStories.notes: More nuanced predictions including wait signals

userStories.title: Implement hyperparameter optimization
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to optimize model hyperparameters to improve prediction accuracy.
acceptanceCriteria: Define hyperparameter search space (learning_rate, max_depth, n_estimators, etc.)
Define optimization objective (maximize validation F1 score)
userStories.notes: Critical for achieving target 65-70% win rate

userStories.title: Implement model evaluation and validation framework
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need a comprehensive evaluation framework to assess model performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate performance metrics: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC
Implement feature importance analysis (gain, cover, weight)
Implement SHAP values for model explainability
Implement per-symbol evaluation (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
Create performance visualizations (equity curve, confusion matrix)
userStories.notes: Essential for understanding model strengths and weaknesses

userStories.title: Implement backtesting framework for model validation
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need a backtesting framework to validate model predictions with realistic trading simulation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Backtester class for historical simulation
Implement signal generation on historical data
Simulate trade execution with realistic slippage (1-2 ticks)
Implement position sizing based on risk management
Calculate trading metrics: win rate, profit factor, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown
Test backtest on 60+ days of historical data
userStories.notes: Critical for validating model before live trading

userStories.title: Set up model inference service foundation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to set up a model inference service to generate real-time predictions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement batch prediction for multiple symbols
Add fallback to previous prediction on model error
Create unit tests for inference service
userStories.notes: Must be fast for real-time trading

userStories.title: Implement real-time prediction generation
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to generate real-time predictions with confidence scores.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement predict() method returning signal + confidence
Add prediction metadata (timestamp, model version, feature set)
Implement prediction thresholding (min confidence for trading)
Add prediction logging for audit trail
Implement prediction performance tracking (actual vs predicted)
Test prediction generation on real-time data
Validate prediction speed meets latency requirements
userStories.notes: Core function of the trading system

userStories.title: Implement signal generation system
userStories.description: As a trading system, I need to combine ML predictions with technical analysis to generate final trading signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement signal cooldown (avoid overtrading, min 5 minutes)
Implement strategy switching based on regime
Generate structured signal object (symbol, direction, confidence, reasons, timestamp)
Test signal generation on historical data
userStories.notes: Combines ML predictions with technical analysis for robustness

userStories.title: Implement model versioning and management
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to manage model versions and track model lifecycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Store model metadata in database (version, training_date, metrics, hyperparameters)
Implement A/B testing for model comparison
Store model artifacts in backend/models/ directory

userStories.title: Implement model performance monitoring
userStories.description: As a system operator, I need to monitor model performance in production to detect degradation.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement prediction tracking (log all predictions with actual outcomes)
Implement performance degradation detection (alert if accuracy drops >5%)
Implement model comparison (current vs previous version)
Add alerting for critical performance issues
userStories.notes: Critical for detecting when models need retraining

userStories.title: Implement ensemble model system
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to implement ensemble methods to combine multiple models for better predictions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement weighted ensemble (model weights based on performance)
Implement stacking ensemble (meta-learner on top of base models)
Implement per-symbol ensembles (specialized models for each symbol)
Select best ensemble method based on validation performance

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must train ML models on 60+ days of historical data
FR-2: System must generate real-time predictions in < 100ms
FR-3: System must achieve 65-70% win rate in backtesting
FR-4: System must provide confidence scores with all predictions
FR-5: System must support model versioning and rollback
FR-6: System must implement backtesting for validation
FR-7: System must monitor model performance in production
FR-8: System must combine ML with technical analysis
FR-9: System must implement signal filtering to avoid overtrading
FR-10: System must log all predictions for audit trail
nonGoals: No deep learning models (LSTM, Transformer) in this phase (future enhancement)
No reinforcement learning in this phase
No hyperparameter optimization with cloud resources (local only)
No automated model deployment (manual deployment in this phase)
No multi-model serving (single model per symbol)
technicalConsiderations: XGBoost is the baseline model (fast, accurate, interpretable)
Feature scaling must be fit on training data only (avoid data leakage)
Class imbalance is common in trading (use class weighting)
Overfitting is a major risk (use early stopping, regularization)
Prediction latency critical for real-time trading (< 100ms)
Model versioning essential for production systems
Backtesting must be realistic (include slippage, spread)
Paper trading required before live trading (2+ weeks)
successMetrics: Model training completes in < 30 minutes for 60 days of data
Model achieves 60%+ accuracy in paper trading
Feature importance analysis completed and documented
Model performance monitoring shows stable accuracy over time
Signal generation produces 5-10 signals per day per symbol
Model versioning and rollback tested and working

techStack.database: SQLite for model metadata and predictions

architecture.trainingFlow: Historical Data → Feature Engineering → Train/Test Split → Model Training → Validation → Backtesting → Model Registration
architecture.inferenceFlow: Real-time Data → Feature Engineering → Model Inference → Signal Generation → Risk Management → Order Execution
architecture.modelManagement: Model Registry with versioning, metadata tracking, performance monitoring

timeline.phase1: Foundation (Days 1-3): Training pipeline setup, data loading, preprocessing
timeline.phase2: Baseline Model (Days 4-7): XGBoost binary classification, evaluation
timeline.phase3: Advanced Models (Days 8-11): Multi-class, hyperparameter optimization, ensemble
timeline.phase4: Inference Service (Days 12-14): Real-time prediction, signal generation, caching
timeline.phase5: Validation (Days 15-17): Backtesting, paper trading, performance monitoring
